title: aster occidentalis subsp. intermedius
intro: Aster occidentalis subsp. intermedius, also known as western American thistle or western Canada thistle, is a subspecies of thistle native to the western regions of North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be utilized in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Aster occidentalis subsp. intermedius include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
